                  # POST /api/v1/inventory_items/batch_create

                  # Accepts array of item data from outfit analysis and creates multiple items atomically

    149. 
            
              3
            

            

                  def batch_create

      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152.

                    unless items_array.is_a?(Array) && items_array.present?
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            
              4
            

            

                      return render json: {
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                        success: false,
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                        error: {
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                          code: "INVALID_PARAMS",

    157.

      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                        },
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                        timestamp: Time.current.iso8601
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                      }, status: :bad_request
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                    end
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

            
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            
              14
            

            

                    created_items = []

    164. 
            
              14

    165.

    167. 
            
              14
            

            

                    ActiveRecord::Base.transaction do
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            
              14
            

            

                      items_array.each_with_index do |item_data, index|
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                        begin
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                          # Convert to ActionController::Parameters if needed
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171.

      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            
              22
            

            

                          if item_data.is_a?(ActionController::Parameters)
          
      173.

    174. 
            

            

                          else
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                            # Convert hash with symbol keys to string keys for Parameters
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                            normalized_data = item_data.stringify_keys
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177.

      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                          end
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

            
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                          # Extract blob_id if present (from outfit photo analysis) BEFORE permitting
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            
              22
            

            

                          blob_id = item_params_hash[:blob_id] || item_params_hash["blob_id"]
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                          # Extract category_id before permitting (in case it gets lost)
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            
              22
            

            

                          category_id = (item_params_hash[:category_id] || item_params_hash["category_id"]).to_i if (item_params_hash[:category_id] || item_params_hash["category_id"]).present?
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

            
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                          # Build item params - permit nested structure
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            
              22
            

            

                          item_params = item_params_hash.permit(
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                            :name, :description, :category_id, :brand_id, :status,
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                            metadata: {}, tag_ids: []
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                          )
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

            
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                          # Ensure category_id is set as integer (permit might convert to string or lose it)
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            
              22
            

            

                          item_params[:category_id] = category_id if category_id.present?
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

            
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                          # Build and normalize category
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            
              22
            

            

                          item = current_user.inventory_items.build(item_params)
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            
              22
            

            

                          if item.category_id.present?
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            
              22
            

            

                            selected = Category.find_by(id: item.category_id)
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            
              22
            

            

                            if selected&.parent_id.present?
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            
              2
            

            

                              item.subcategory_id = selected.id
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            
              2
            

            

                              node = selected
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            
              2
            

            

                              node = node.respond_to?(:parent_category) ? node.parent_category : node.parent while node&.parent_id.present?
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            
              2
            

            

                              item.category_id = node&.id || selected.id
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                            end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

                          end

    207. 
            

            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            
              22
            

            

                          if item.save
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                            # Handle blob attachment if provided
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            
              18
            

            

                            if blob_id.present?
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                              begin
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            
              4
            

            

                                blob = ActiveStorage::Blob.find_by(id: blob_id.to_i)
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            
              4
            

            

                                if blob
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            
              4
            

            

                                  item.primary_image.attach(blob)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            
              4
            

            

                                  item.reload
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            
              4
            

            

                                  Rails.logger.info "Attached blob #{blob.id} to batch-created item #{item.id}"
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                                end
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                              rescue StandardError => e
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                                Rails.logger.warn "Failed to attach blob to item at index #{index}: #{e.message}"
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                                # Continue - item created, just image attachment failed
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                              end
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                            end
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

            
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            
              18
            

            

                            created_items << item
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                          else
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            
              4
            

            

                            errors << {
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                              index: index,
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                              errors: item.errors.full_messages
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                            }
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                          end
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                        rescue StandardError => e
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                          Rails.logger.error "Error creating item at index #{index}: #{e.message}"
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

                          errors << {
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

                            index: index,
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

                            errors: [ e.message ]
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                          }
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                        end
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                      end

    239. 
            

            

            
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

                      # If any errors, rollback transaction
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            
              14
            

            

                      if errors.any?
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            
              4
            

            

                        raise ActiveRecord::Rollback
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                      end
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            

                    end
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

            
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            
              14
            

            

                    if errors.any?
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            
              4
            

            

                      render json: {
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                        success: false,
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                        error: {
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                          code: "BATCH_CREATE_ERROR",

    251. 
            

            

                          message: "Some items failed to create",

      253.

                        },

    260.

                        },

      266.

      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267.

                  # GET /api/v1/inventory_items/:id/similar
          
      329.

              3
            

            

                  def similar

      159.

                  def safe_variant_url(image, dimensions)
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            
              33

    148. 
            

            

                    # Try to generate variant URL, but catch errors gracefully
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                    # This prevents 500 errors when VIPS/ImageMagick is not installed
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                    begin
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                      # Check if variant can be created (this will fail if processor is not available)
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            
              33
            

            

                      variant = image.variant(resize_to_limit: dimensions)
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                      
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                      # If variant creation succeeded, generate URL

              33

      161.

    162.

    25.

    32. 
            

            

                    7. Material: Identify the material/fabric if visible
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33.

      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34.

    35.

    36.

                def prepare_image_data
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                  # Convert ActiveStorage blob to base64 data URI for vision API
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            
              9
            

            

                  return nil unless image_blob.present?
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

            
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                  # Download blob data
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            
              9
            

            

                  image_data = image_blob.download
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

            
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                  # Convert to base64
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            
              9
            

            

                  base64_data = Base64.strict_encode64(image_data)
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

            
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                  # Get content type
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            
              9
            

            

                  content_type = image_blob.content_type || "image/jpeg"
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

            
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                  # Return data URI format
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            
              9
            

            

                  "data:#{content_type};base64,#{base64_data}"
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

            
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            
              1
            

            

                def analysis_prompt
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                  # Get available categories to help the AI choose correctly
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            
              10
            

            

                  available_categories = Category.active.order(:name).pluck(:name).join(", ")
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

            
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            
              10
            

            

                  <<~PROMPT
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                    You are a fashion analysis AI. Analyze this image of a clothing/fashion item and extract all relevant information for creating an inventory item.
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

            
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                    IMPORTANT: You MUST choose a category_name from the following list of available categories in the database:
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                    #{available_categories}
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

            
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    If the item doesn't match any category exactly, choose the CLOSEST match. For example:
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                    - "Satchel", "Handbag", "Tote", "Backpack", "Purse" → use "Bags" (if available) or the closest match
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                    - "Chelsea Boots", "Ankle Boots" → use "Boots" or "Ankle Boots" (if available)
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                    - Use the most specific category that exists in the list above
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

            
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                    Extract and return the following information as valid JSON:
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

            
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

                    {
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                      "category_name": "Category name FROM THE LIST ABOVE - must match exactly or be very close (this is critical for matching)",
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                      "name": "Descriptive name for this item (e.g., 'Blue Cotton T-Shirt', 'Nike Running Sneakers')",
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                      "description": "Rich, detailed description for vector search. Include: colors, materials, size if visible, style characteristics, fit details, seasonality, occasions suitable for, and any notable features. Be comprehensive and descriptive - this will be used for semantic search. Example: 'A vibrant mint green structured leather satchel with a clean, minimalist aesthetic. Features include a top handle, detachable shoulder strap, secure closure, and visible stitching. The structured design maintains its shape and provides a polished, professional look. Suitable for everyday use, work, and casual occasions. Made from high-quality leather with silver hardware accents. This versatile bag transitions well across seasons.'",
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                      "brand_name": "Brand name if visible, or null if not visible",
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                      "style_notes": "Any additional style notes or observations about the item's aesthetic or design",
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                      "confidence": 0.0 to 1.0
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                    }
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

            
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

                    Important:
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

                    - Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown formatting or additional text
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

                    - category_name MUST be from the available categories list above - this is critical for successful matching
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                    - description should be RICH and COMPREHENSIVE - include colors, materials, style, fit, season, occasion, and features. This is used for vector search.
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                    - If information is not visible or unclear, use null for that field (except description - always provide a description)
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                    - confidence should reflect how certain you are about the overall analysis
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

                  PROMPT
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

                end
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

            
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            
              1
            

            

                def parse_analysis_response(content)
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                  # Try to extract JSON from the response
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            
              9
            

            

                  json_match = content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/m)
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

            
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            
              9
            

            

                  if json_match
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            
              8
            

            

                    parsed = JSON.parse(json_match[0])
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                    # Ensure required fields exist
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            
              7
            

            

                    parsed["confidence"] ||= 0.5
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            
              7
            

            

                    parsed["description"] ||= "No description available"
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            
              7
            

            

                    parsed
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                  else
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            
              1
            

            

                    Rails.logger.warn "Could not parse JSON from AI response: #{content.truncate(200)}"
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            
              1
            

            

                    {
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                      "category_name" => nil,
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                      "name" => "Unidentified Item",
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                      "description" => content.truncate(500),
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                      "brand_name" => nil,
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

                      "style_notes" => nil,
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            

                      "confidence" => 0.2,
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

                      "parse_error" => true
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            

                    }
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            

                  end
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            

                rescue JSON::ParserError => e
          
      265.

      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            
              1
            

            

                  {
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            

                    "category_name" => nil,
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            

                    "name" => "Unidentified Item",
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269.

      270.

      275.

                def enhance_with_matching(results)
          
      279.

    281.

      282.

                    results["category_id"] = matched_category&.id

      369.

      370. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    370. 
            
              8

              28

      372.

              28

      373.

      374. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    374.

      376.

                      cat_words.each do |cat_word|

      378.

              98

      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Ollama API returned status #{tags_response.code}"
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                    end
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

            
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            
              2
            

            

                    models_data = JSON.parse(tags_response.body)
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            
              2
            

            

                    available_models = models_data["models"] || []
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

            
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            
              2
            

            

                    model_exists = available_models.any? do |m|
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            
              2
            

            

                      (m["name"] && (m["name"] == model_name || m["name"].start_with?("#{model_name}:"))) ||
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            

            

                      (m["model"] && (m["model"] == model_name || m["model"].start_with?("#{model_name}:")))
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                    end
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

            
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            
              2
            

            

                    unless model_exists
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                      model_names = available_models.map { |m| m["name"] || m["model"] }.compact.join(", ")
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                      Rails.logger.warn "Model #{model_name} not found in Ollama. Available models: #{model_names}"
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Model #{model_name} is not available in Ollama. Available models: #{model_names}. Please pull it first: ollama pull #{model_name}"
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                    end
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

            
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            
              2
            

            

                    Rails.logger.info "✓ Ollama is available and model #{model_name} is present"
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                  rescue Errno::ECONNREFUSED, Errno::EHOSTUNREACH, SocketError => e
          
      92.

                    Rails.logger.error "Cannot connect to Ollama at #{ollama_base}: #{e.message}"
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            
              1
            

            

                    raise StandardError, "Ollama service is not available at #{ollama_base}. Please ensure Ollama is running."
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                  rescue Net::ReadTimeout, Net::OpenTimeout, Timeout::Error => e
          
      95.

      96.

      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                  rescue JSON::ParserError => e

      99.

      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                  rescue StandardError => e
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                    raise e if e.message.include?("Ollama") || e.message.include?("Model")
          
      102.

                    Rails.logger.error "Error checking Ollama availability: #{e.message}"

      104.

                def perform_analysis
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            
              2
            

            

                  prompt = analysis_prompt
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

            
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

                  # Create a temporary chat for analysis
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            
              2
            

            

                  chat = create_chat
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            

            

            
          
      113. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    113. 
            

            

                  begin
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            
              2
            

            

                    image_path = nil
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            
              2
            

            

                    temp_file = nil
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

            
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

                    # Try to get the file path from ActiveStorage (works for DiskService)
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            
              2
            

            

                    if image_blob.service.respond_to?(:path_for)
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

                      image_path = image_blob.service.path_for(image_blob.key)
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                    end
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

            
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                    # If we don't have a direct path, create a temp file
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            
              2
            

            

                    unless image_path && File.exist?(image_path)
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            
              2
            

            

                      require "tempfile"
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            
              2
            

            

                      extension = image_blob.filename.extension_with_delimiter || ".jpg"
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file = Tempfile.new([ "ollama_outfit", extension ])
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file.binmode
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file.write(image_blob.download)
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file.flush
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            
              2
            

            

                      image_path = temp_file.path
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                    end
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

            
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            

                    # Use RubyLLM's 'with:' parameter to pass the image file path
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            
              2
            

            

                    assistant_message = chat.ask(prompt, with: image_path)
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            

            
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            

            

                    # Clean up temp file if we created one
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            
              2
            

            

                    if temp_file
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file.close
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            
              2
            

            

                      temp_file.unlink
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

                    end
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

            
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            
              2
            

            

                    unless assistant_message&.content.present?
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Empty response from AI model"
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

                    end
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

            
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

                    # Parse the response into structured data
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147.

                    parse_analysis_response(assistant_message.content)
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                  rescue ArgumentError => e

                    raise e
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151.

      153.

                    if e.message.include?("connection") || e.message.include?("refused")
          
      154.

      155.

    158.

      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

            
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            
              1
            

            

                def create_chat
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                  # Create a temporary chat for this analysis session
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            
              2
            

            

                  model = Model.find_or_create_by!(
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                    provider: "ollama",
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                    model_id: model_name
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                  ) do |m|
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            
              2
            

            

                    m.name = model_name
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            
              2
            

            

                    m.context_window = 8192
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            
              2
            

            

                    m.family = "gemma"
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                  end
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

            
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            
              2
            

            

                  Chat.create!(
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                    user: user,
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

                    model: model
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

                  ).tap do |chat|
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            
              2
            

            

                    Rails.logger.info "Created chat #{chat.id} for outfit photo analysis"
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176.

      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177.

    178. 
            

            

            
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            
              1
            

            

                def analysis_prompt
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                  # Get available categories to help the AI choose correctly
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            
              3
            

            

                  available_categories = Category.active.order(:name).pluck(:name).join(", ")
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            
              3
            

            

                  <<~PROMPT
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                    You are a fashion analysis AI. Analyze this image of a complete outfit and detect ALL individual clothing items, shoes, accessories, and jewelry visible in the photo.
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

            
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                    IMPORTANT: You MUST choose category_name for each item from the following list of available categories in the database:
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                    #{available_categories}
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

            
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                    If an item doesn't match any category exactly, choose the CLOSEST match from the list above.
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                    Detect and extract information for EACH separate item in the outfit. Return an array of items with the following structure:
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

            
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                    {
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                      "total_items": <number of items detected>,
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                      "items": [
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                        {
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                          "category_name": "Category name FROM THE LIST ABOVE - must match exactly or be very close",
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                          "name": "Descriptive name for this item (e.g., 'Blue Cotton T-Shirt', 'Nike Running Sneakers')",
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                          "description": "Rich, detailed description for vector search. Include: colors, materials, size if visible, style characteristics, fit details, seasonality, occasions suitable for, and any notable features. Be comprehensive and descriptive.",
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                          "brand_name": "Brand name if visible, or null if not visible",
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                          "style_notes": "Any additional style notes or observations about the item's aesthetic or design",
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                          "position": "Description of where this item appears in the outfit (e.g., 'top layer', 'bottom', 'footwear', 'accessory')",
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                          "confidence": 0.0 to 1.0
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                        },
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                        ... (repeat for each detected item)
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

                      ]
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                    }
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

            
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                    Important:
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                    - Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown formatting or additional text
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                    - Detect ALL visible items: clothing (tops, bottoms, outerwear), shoes, bags, accessories, jewelry, etc.
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                    - category_name MUST be from the available categories list above for each item
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                    - description should be RICH and COMPREHENSIVE for each item - include colors, materials, style, fit, season, occasion, and features
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                    - If information is not visible or unclear for an item, use null for that field (except description - always provide a description)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                    - confidence should reflect how certain you are about each item's analysis
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                    - Include at least 2-3 items minimum (outfit typically has multiple pieces)
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    - Be thorough but accurate - don't invent items that aren't clearly visible
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                  PROMPT
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                end
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

            
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            
              1
            

            

                def parse_analysis_response(content)
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                  # Try to extract JSON from the response
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            
              6
            

            

                  json_match = content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/m)
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

            
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            
              6
            

            

                  if json_match
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            
              5
            

            

                    parsed = JSON.parse(json_match[0])
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

            
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                    # Ensure items array exists
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            
              5
            

            

                    parsed["items"] ||= []
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            
              5
            

            

                    parsed["total_items"] = parsed["items"].length
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

            
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                    # Ensure each item has required fields
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            
              5
            

            

                    parsed["items"] = parsed["items"].map do |item|
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            
              6
            

            

                      item["confidence"] ||= 0.5
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            
              6
            

            

                      item["description"] ||= "No description available"
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            
              6
            

            

                      item["position"] ||= "unknown"
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            
              6
            

            

                      item
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                    end
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

            
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            
              5
            

            

                    parsed
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

                  else
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            
              1
            

            

                    Rails.logger.warn "Could not parse JSON from AI response: #{content.truncate(200)}"
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                    {
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            
              1
            

            

                      "items" => [],
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

                      "total_items" => 0,
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

                      "parse_error" => true,
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            

                      "error" => "Could not parse response"
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                    }
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                  end
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                rescue JSON::ParserError => e
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                  Rails.logger.error "JSON parse error: #{e.message}"
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                  {
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            

                    "items" => [],
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            

                    "total_items" => 0,
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                    "parse_error" => true,
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                    "error" => e.message
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                  }
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                end
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              1
            

            

                def enhance_item_with_matching(item_data)
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

                  # Match category from database
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              4
            

            

                  if item_data["category_name"].present?
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            
              3
            

            

                    matched_category = find_matching_category(item_data["category_name"])
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            
              3
            

            

                    item_data["category_id"] = matched_category&.id
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            
              3

                def shoes_analysis_prompt
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            
              1
            

            

                  <<~PROMPT
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

                    You are a footwear analysis AI. Please analyze this shoe item and provide:
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

            
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                    1. Item type: #{inventory_item.item_type}
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                    2. Category: #{inventory_item.category&.name || "Not specified"}
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

                    3. Brand: #{inventory_item.brand&.name || "Not specified"}
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

                    4. Name: #{inventory_item.name}
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

                    5. Colors: Extract dominant colors
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                    6. Style: Type of shoes (athletic, casual, formal, boots, sandals, etc.)
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                    7. Material: Upper and sole material
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                    8. Season: When to wear these
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            

                    9. Occasion: Appropriate occasions
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            

                    10. Size notes: Any sizing information visible
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            

                    11. Condition assessment: If visible
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                    12. Brand suggestion: If brand is not set
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                    13. Category suggestion: If category is wrong
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                    14. Confidence: Your confidence (0.0 to 1.0)
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

            
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            

                    Return valid JSON with these keys:
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            

                    {
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39. 
            

            

                      "item_type": "shoes",
          
      40. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    40.

    41.

    43.

      51.

                def parse_analysis_response(content)

    60.

    61. 
            
              1
            

            

                      "item_type" => "shoes",

      63.

    177. 
            

            

                essential_patterns = {
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            
              15
            

            

                  top: [ "top", "shirt", "blouse", "t-shirt", "sweater" ],
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

                  bottom: [ "bottom", "jean", "pant", "skirt", "short" ],
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                  shoe: [ "shoe", "boot", "sneaker", "sandal" ]
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                }
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            
              15
            

            

                essential_patterns.each do |type, patterns|
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            
              319
            

            

                  has_type = existing_lower.any? { |cat| patterns.any? { |pattern| cat.include?(pattern) } }
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            
              45
            

            

                  missing << type.to_s unless has_type
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                end
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

            
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            
              15
            

            

                missing
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

              end
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            
              2
            

            

              def self.calculate_style_similarity(outfit_items, candidate_item)
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                return 0.0 unless candidate_item.embedding_vector.present?
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

            
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                # Calculate average vector of outfit items that have vectors
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                vectors_with_embeddings = outfit_items.select { |item| item.embedding_vector.present? }
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                return 0.0 if vectors_with_embeddings.empty?
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                # Simple average of vectors (for style matching)
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                avg_vector = vectors_with_embeddings.map(&:embedding_vector).transpose.map { |x| x.reduce(:+) / x.size.to_f }
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

            
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                # Calculate cosine similarity (simplified - just use VectorSearchService)
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                similar = find_similar_items(vectors_with_embeddings.first.user, avg_vector, limit: 20)
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

            
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                # Find rank of candidate in similar items
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                rank = similar.index(candidate_item)
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

                return 0.0 unless rank
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                # Higher score for better matches (lower rank = better match)
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                1.0 / (rank + 1)
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

              end
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

            
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            
              2
            

            

              def self.get_suggestion_reason(base_item, candidate_item, existing_categories)
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            
              25
            

            

                base_cat = base_item.category&.name || "item"
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            
              25
            

            

                candidate_cat = candidate_item.category&.name || "item"
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

            
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            
              25
            

            

                if complementary_category?(base_cat, candidate_cat)
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                  "Pairs well with #{base_cat}"
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            
              25
            

            

                elsif existing_categories.include?(candidate_cat)
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                  "Similar style to your #{candidate_cat}"
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                else
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            
              25
            

            

                  "Complements your outfit"
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                end
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

              end
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

            end
          
      225.
